zh.lifeSummary: 當Edgar of Dunbar於1130年之前出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴時，他的父親Gospatric II67歲，母親Sybil Morel59歲。他於大約1139年與Alice Greystoke在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1179年之後在英國英格蘭波藍德德利格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edgar of Dunbar于1130年之前出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴时，他的父亲Gospatric II67岁，母亲Sybil Morel59岁。他于大约1139年与Alice Greystoke在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1179年之后在英国英格兰波藍德德利格。

nameMeanings.name: Edgar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gār ‘spear’. This was the name of an English king and saint, Edgar the Peaceful ( d. 975 ), and of Edgar Atheling ( ?1060–?1125 ), the young prince who was chosen by the English to succeed Harold as king in 1066 , but who was supplanted by the Normans. Although used only infrequently in Britain, it is still fairly popular in the United States.

variants.name: Edgard
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gār ‘spear’. This was the name of an English king and saint, Edgar the Peaceful ( d. 975 ), and of Edgar Atheling ( ?1060–?1125 ), the young prince who was chosen by the English to succeed Harold as king in 1066 , but who was supplanted by the Normans. Although used only infrequently in Britain, it is still fairly popular in the United States.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

en.lifeSummary: When Edgar of Dunbar was born before 1130, in Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gospatric II, was 67 and his mother, Sybil Morel, was 59. He married Alice Greystoke about 1139, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1179, in Drigg, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Alice Greystoke environ 1139, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1179, à Drigg, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edgar of Dunbarが1130年以前にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダンバーで生まれた時，父Gospatric IIは67歳，母Sybil Morelは59歳であった。約1139年にイギリススコットランドでAlice Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1179年以後にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドドリググで死去した。

ko.Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바
ko.lifeSummary: Edgar of Dunbar(이)가 1130년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gospatric II(은)는 67세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil Morel(은)는 59세였다. 그는 대략 1139년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Alice Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1179년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 드리그에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edgar of Dunbar nasceu antes 1130, em Dunbar, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gospatric II, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Morel, tinha 59 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Greystoke aproximadamente 1139, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1179, em Drigg, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland,: дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edgar of Dunbar родился перед 1130 г. в местности дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gospatric II было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Morel, 59. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Greystoke около 1139 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1179 г. в местности дриг, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.
